Utility)
testbasec
TestStateFWc
superr
myinitZ
_start_ovsZ
_start_netagent)
self
	__class__
@/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/na_tests/ft/test_stateful_fw.pyr
TestStateFW.myinitc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
fw_by_add_config_fw_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='fw_config' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>15fdfa87-ce43-4402-9927-3f6f74524691</uuid>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <tcp srcipaddr='1.2.3.5' srcipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_config_fw_default > {nwfilterdir}/{fwconfig}.xml
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
na-ctl add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={fwconfig}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={fwconfig}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {fwconfig}
ovs-ofctl dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep "ct_state=+new-est,tcp,reg1=0x.*/0xffff,nw_src=1.2.3.5" br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
na-ctl add-listen --id=2 --event="remove Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter"
ovs-vsctl remove Interface p2 other_config nwfilter
na-ctl wait --id=2
ovs-ofctl dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep "ct_state=+new-est,tcp,reg1=0x.*/0xffff,nw_src=1.2.3.5" br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 1; then
    exit 3
Z	fw_config)
fwconfig
nwfilterdir
test_dirTr
z+test fw config failed: shell return code:%d
cmd_execute
formatZ
nwfilter_dirZ	_test_dirZ
assertEqual
retr
test_fw_config
TestStateFW.test_fw_configc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
fw_by_add_white_icmp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='white_icmp' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>15fdfa87-ce43-4402-9927-3f6f74524691</uuid>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <icmp srcipaddr='1.2.3.5' srcipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_white_icmp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{whiteicmp}.xml
na-ctl add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={whiteicmp}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={whiteicmp}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {whiteicmp}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.5,dst=1.2.3.6,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:ct(commit),2' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.6,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
white_icmp)
Z	whiteicmpr
z,test white icmp failed: shell return code:%dr
test_white_icmpI
TestStateFW.test_white_icmpc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
fw_by_add_white_tcp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='white_tcp' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>15fdfa87-ce43-4402-9927-3f6f74524691</uuid>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <tcp srcipaddr='1.2.3.5' srcipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_white_tcp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{whitetcp}.xml
na-ctl add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={whitetcp}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={whitetcp}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {whitetcp}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.5,dst=1.2.3.6,proto=6,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),tcp(src=8,dst=7),tcp_flags(ack)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:ct(commit),2' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.6,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=6,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),tcp(src=8,dst=7),tcp_flags(ack)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
Z	white_tcp)
whitetcpr
z+test white tcp failed: shell return code:%dr
test_white_tcp
TestStateFW.test_white_tcpc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
fw_by_add_white_udp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='white_udp' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>15fdfa87-ce43-4402-9927-3f6f74524691</uuid>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <udp srcipaddr='1.2.3.6' srcipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_white_udp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{whiteudp}.xml
na-ctl add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={whiteudp}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={whiteudp}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {whiteudp}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p2 'in_port(2),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.6,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=17,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),udp(src=7777,dst=80)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:ct(commit),1' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p2 'in_port(2),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.5,dst=1.2.3.6,proto=17,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),udp(src=7777,dst=80)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
Z	white_udp)
whiteudpr
z+test white udp failed: shell return code:%dr
test_white_udp
TestStateFW.test_white_udpc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
fw_by_add_black_icmp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='black_icmp' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>4ef74acc-8778-4219-87e7-10d4e3e5874a</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <icmp srcipaddr='1.2.3.5' srcipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_black_icmp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{blackicmp}.xml
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={blackicmp}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={blackicmp}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {blackicmp}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.5,dst=1.2.3.6,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.6,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:ct(commit),2' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
black_icmp)
Z	blackicmpr
z,test black icmp failed: shell return code:%dr
test_black_icmp
TestStateFW.test_black_icmpc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
fw_by_add_black_tcp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='black_tcp' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>4ef74acc-8778-4219-87e7-10d4e3e5874a</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <tcp srcipaddr='1.2.3.5' srcipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_black_tcp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{blacktcp}.xml
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={blacktcp}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={blacktcp}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {blacktcp}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.5,dst=1.2.3.6,proto=6,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),tcp(src=8,dst=7),tcp_flags(ack)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.6,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=6,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),tcp(src=8,dst=7),tcp_flags(ack)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:ct(commit),2' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
Z	black_tcp)
blacktcpr

ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
fw_by_add_black_udp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='black_udp' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>4ef74acc-8778-4219-87e7-10d4e3e5874a</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <udp srcipaddr='1.2.3.5' srcipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_black_udp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{blackudp}.xml
na-ctl add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={blackudp}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={blackudp}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {blackudp}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.5,dst=1.2.3.6,proto=17,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),udp(src=7777,dst=80)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.6,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=17,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),udp(src=7777,dst=80)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:ct(commit),2' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
Z	black_udp)
blackudpr
z+test black udp failed: shell return code:%dr
test_black_udps
TestStateFW.test_black_udpc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
fw_by_add_white_icmp6_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='white_icmp6' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>15fdfa87-ce43-4402-9927-3f6f74524691</uuid>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <icmpv6 srcipaddr='2001:db8::1' srcipmask='128' type='128' code='0'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_white_icmp6_default > {nwfilterdir}/{whiteicmp6}.xml
na-ctl add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={whiteicmp6}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={whiteicmp6}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {whiteicmp6}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x86dd),ipv6(src=2001:db8::1,dst=2001:db8::2,proto=58,frag=no),icmpv6(type=128)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:ct(commit),2' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x86dd),ipv6(src=2001:db8::2,dst=2001:db8::1,proto=58,frag=no),icmpv6(type=128)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
white_icmp6)
whiteicmp6r
z-test white icmp6 failed: shell return code:%dr
test_white_icmp6
TestStateFW.test_white_icmp6c
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
fw_by_add_white_tcp6_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='white_tcp6' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>15fdfa87-ce43-4402-9927-3f6f74524691</uuid>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <tcp-ipv6 srcipaddr='2001:db8::1' srcipmask='128'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_white_tcp6_default > {nwfilterdir}/{whitetcp6}.xml
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
na-ctl add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={whitetcp6}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={whitetcp6}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {whitetcp6}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x86dd),ipv6(src=2001:db8::1,dst=2001:db8::2,proto=6,frag=no),tcp(src=8,dst=7),tcp_flags(ack)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:ct(commit),2' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x86dd),ipv6(src=2001:db8::2,dst=2001:db8::1,proto=6,frag=no),tcp(src=8,dst=7),tcp_flags(ack)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
white_tcp6)
Z	whitetcp6r
z%test white tcp6: shell return code:%dr
test_white_tcp6
TestStateFW.test_white_tcp6c
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
fw_by_add_white_udp6_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='white_udp6' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>15fdfa87-ce43-4402-9927-3f6f74524691</uuid>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <udp-ipv6 srcipaddr='2001:db8::1' srcipmask='128'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_white_udp6_default > {nwfilterdir}/{whiteudp6}.xml
na-ctl add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={whiteudp6}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={whiteudp6}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {whiteudp6}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:09,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0a),eth_type(0x86dd),ipv6(src=2001:db8::1,dst=2001:db8::2,label=0,proto=17,tclass=0x70,hlimit=128,frag=no),udp(src=1,dst=2)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:ct(commit),2' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:09,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0a),eth_type(0x86dd),ipv6(src=2001:db8::2,dst=2001:db8::1,label=0,proto=17,tclass=0x70,hlimit=128,frag=no),udp(src=1,dst=2)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
white_udp6)
Z	whiteudp6r
z,test white udp6 failed: shell return code:%dr
test_white_udp6$
TestStateFW.test_white_udp6c
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
fw_by_add_black_icmp6_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='black_icmp6' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>4ef74acc-8778-4219-87e7-10d4e3e5874a</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <icmpv6 srcipaddr='2001:db8::1' srcipmask='128' type='128' code='0'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_black_icmp6_default > {nwfilterdir}/{blackicmp6}.xml
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={blackicmp6}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={blackicmp6}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {blackicmp6}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x86dd),ipv6(src=2001:db8::1,dst=2001:db8::2,proto=58,frag=no),icmpv6(type=128)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x86dd),ipv6(src=2001:db8::2,dst=2001:db8::1,proto=58,frag=no),icmpv6(type=128)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:ct(commit),2' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
black_icmp6)
blackicmp6r
z-test black icmp6 failed: shell return code:%dr
test_black_icmp6_
TestStateFW.test_black_icmp6c
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
fw_by_add_black_tcp6_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='black_tcp6' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>4ef74acc-8778-4219-87e7-10d4e3e5874a</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <tcp-ipv6 srcipaddr='2001:db8::1' srcipmask='128'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_black_tcp6_default > {nwfilterdir}/{blacktcp6}.xml
na-ctl add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={blacktcp6}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={blacktcp6}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {blacktcp6}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge           # ??? empty flow
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x86dd),ipv6(src=2001:db8::1,dst=2001:db8::2,proto=6,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),tcp(src=8,dst=7),tcp_flags(ack)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows.txt
ret=$?
if test $ret neq 1; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:05,dst=50:54:00:00:01:00),eth_type(0x86dd),ipv6(src=2001:db8::1,dst=2001:db8::2,proto=6,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),tcp(src=8,dst=7),tcp_flags(ack)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows1.txt
ret=$?
if test $ret neq 0; then
    exit 3
black_tcp6)
Z	blacktcp6r
z.test basic tcp_in failed: shell return code:%dr
test_black_tcp6
TestStateFW.test_black_tcp6c
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
fw_by_add_black_udp6_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='black_udp6' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>4ef74acc-8778-4219-87e7-10d4e3e5874a</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <udp-ipv6 srcipaddr='2001:db8::1' srcipmask='128'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_black_udp6_default > {nwfilterdir}/{blackudp6}.xml
na-ctl add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={blackudp6}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p2 other_config:nwfilter={blackudp6}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {blackudp6}
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:09,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0a),eth_type(0x86dd),ipv6(src=2001:db8::1,dst=2001:db8::2,proto=17,frag=no),udp(src=1,dst=2)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:09,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0a),eth_type(0x86dd),ipv6(src=2001:db8::2,dst=2001:db8::1,proto=17,frag=no),udp(src=1,dst=2)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:ct(commit),2' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
black_udp6)
Z	blackudp6r
z,test black udp6 failed: shell return code:%dr
test_black_udp6
TestStateFW.test_black_udp6)

__module__
__qualname__r
